title: COUNSELING SERVICES - 211info
text: DIRKSE COUNSELING & CONSULTING COUNSELING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient counseling services to individuals, couples, and families. 9725 SW Beaverton-Hillsdale Highway Suite 230 Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, Saturday by appointment Email (503) 265-9256 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 265-9256 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP. Provides payment plans and reduced fee agreement for those needing financial assistance. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington County Services: Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MUTUAL SUPPORT - POSTPARTUM SUPPORT GROUP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
